SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.api14c

Class Api14cSafeChartItem

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.api14c.Api14cSafeChartItem
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Api14cSafeChartItem extends Object implements Serializable
Single row in an API RP 14C / ISO 10418 SAFE chart: equipment, category, required devices, present devices and missing devices.
Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

      • Constant Field Values

      private final Api14cEquipmentCategory category

  • Constructor Details

    • Api14cSafeChartItem

      public Api14cSafeChartItem(String equipmentName, Api14cEquipmentCategory category, Set<Api14cDeviceType> required, Set<Api14cDeviceType> present)
      Creates a SAFE-chart row.
      Parameters:
      equipmentName - process equipment name (e.g. tag number)
      category - equipment category
      required - required devices per the SAFE table
      present - devices declared as installed

  • Method Details

    • getEquipmentName

      public String getEquipmentName()
      Returns:
      equipment name

    • getCategory

      public Api14cEquipmentCategory getCategory()
      Returns:
      equipment category

    • getRequired

      public Set<Api14cDeviceType> getRequired()
      Returns:
      required device set

    • getPresent

      public Set<Api14cDeviceType> getPresent()
      Returns:
      device set declared as present

    • getMissing

      public Set<Api14cDeviceType> getMissing()
      Returns:
      required \ present (the SAFE-chart gaps)

    • isComplete

      public boolean isComplete()
      Returns:
      true when no required device is missing

    • toRow

      public List<String> toRow()
      Returns:
      rendered table row for printing in a report

    • joined

      private static String joined(Set<Api14cDeviceType> s)
